description_long: This is a modern, freestanding refrigerator with a side-by-side door configuration, finished in a smooth, light gray color. The front features two long, vertical handles, one on each door, with a rectangular panel that likely represents a water or ice dispenser on the right door. The sides and back are plain and unadorned, with a boxy, rectangular shape and sharp edges. The refrigerator appears to be constructed primarily from metal, likely steel, with a powder-coated or painted finish, and may have plastic or rubber components for the handles and seals. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for placement in urban environments such as garages, apartment complexes, or communal kitchens. No visible branding or decorative elements are present, emphasizing a utilitarian aesthetic.
description: A sleek, light gray side-by-side refrigerator with long vertical handles and a rectangular dispenser panel on the front. The design is minimalist and modern, with plain sides and a boxy shape.
description_view_0: Front view showing two vertical handles and a rectangular dispenser panel on the right door.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, flat surface with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a completely flat, featureless back panel.
description_view_3: Right side view, similar to the left, with a plain, unadorned surface.
attribute_door_handle_style: Two long, vertical, protruding handles mounted on the front of each door.
